name: Custer's Garage Inc

name: Romano's School Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Private Passenger / Authorized for Hire
inc_date: 1953 (founding; PA entity registration date not publicly retrieved)
officers: Robert G. 'Robbie' Romano Sr. (former owner/partner, deceased)
registry_source: PA Department of State (not directly fetched); Colonial School District board minutes confirm 2019 property sale
notes: Business ceased operating. In Sept 2019 Colonial School District purchased the 1065 Belvoir Rd property for $6.85M; property now leased to First Student as bus depot. Yellow Pages and Yelp list business as CLOSED. USDOT record inactive.

name: Schoolman Transportation Syst
inc_date: 1985-09-30 (NY DOS filing; originally formed in NJ 1982-03-01)
officers: William E. Schoolman (CEO and Registered Agent)
entity_status: active (NY DOS; statement past due since 9/30/2017)
notes: Also operates as 'Classic Coach'. WARN notice filed 2016 for layoffs. USDOT 299684 now inactive in SAFER per direct fetch; secondary databases list 9 trucks/32 drivers from last reported snapshot. Carrier appears wound down or transitioned. NY DOS entity reportedly still active but statement past due.

name: Holiday Express
carrier_operation: Intrastate Only (Non-HM); Authorized for Hire; Passengers
fmcsa_address: 2510 S North Road, Grand Island, NE 68803
inc_date: 1979-10-22 (Nebraska corporation; business operating since 1961 per BBB)
officers: Mick Brown (President), Lori Brown (Vice President), Mckenzie Brown (Director of Transportation)
registry_source: BBB Business Profile (cites incorporation date 10/22/1979); Nebraska Secretary of State (not directly fetched)
notes: FMCSA legal name is 'DOC HOLIDAY EXPRESS' (USDOT 1104691) at exactly 2510 S North Rd, Grand Island, NE - same phone (308) 384-1800 and same family ownership as Holiday Express Bus. Fleet: 19 small school buses + 75 large school buses + 5 vans = 99 total. School-bus contracts with Grand Island Public Schools, Northwest, Crete, Blue Hill, Central Catholic, Hastings St. Cecilia. MC-452427 cited by bubba.ai.
